description_long: This object is a compact, pump-action shotgun with a matte tan and black finish, featuring a synthetic stock with a camouflage pattern. The barrel is relatively short and black, with a front sight bead and a rear sight notch for aiming. The receiver and fore-end are tan, contrasting with the darker barrel and stock. The buttstock has a textured, rubberized recoil pad for shoulder comfort and improved grip. The trigger guard and trigger are visible, and the fore-end has ribbed texturing for secure handling. The overall design is rugged and utilitarian, suitable for outdoor or tactical use.
description: A compact, pump-action shotgun with a tan and black finish, camouflage stock, and ribbed fore-end for grip.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow barrel and sight alignment, with the camouflage stock barely visible.
description_view_1: Side profile highlighting the tan receiver, black barrel, camouflage stock, and ribbed fore-end.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the textured recoil pad and the alignment of the stock and barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile showing the same features as view 1, with the ejection port and trigger guard visible.
